Description.description: Journal entry header. Tracks workflow state (Draft -> PendingApproval -> Approved -> Posted; or Voided/Reversed) and SoD-relevant user lookups. Lines live on rm_journalentryline. Posted ledger writes are owned by the Phase 6 plugin (PostJournalEntryPlugin).
Unique identifier of the user who created the record.
Date and time when the record was created.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.
Sequence number of the import that created this record.
Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.
Date and time when the record was modified.
Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.
Unique identifier for the organization
Date and time that the record was migrated.
User who approved this JE. SoD: must differ from rm_createdby_user before status can reach Approved.
When this JE was approved. Set by the approval plugin.
Original creator of the JE. Set once by plugin and never updated; deliberate, immutable record consumed by SoD checks (distinct from the reassignable system createdby field).
Legal entity this JE belongs to. Every JE belongs to exactly one entity.
Fiscal period this JE posts to. PostJournalEntryPlugin (Phase 6) rejects posting if the period is not Open.
Quick filter flag set true when this JE was generated to reverse another JE. The link to the original lives on rm_reversesje.
Quick filter flag set true when this JE was generated to reverse another JE. The link to the original lives on rm_reversesje.
Optional classifier. Used by reporting and by recurring/closing automation in later phases.
Ordinary one-off JE.
Generated from a recurring JE template.
Period-end adjustment.
Period-close or year-end clearing entry.
Half of a matched IC pair.
Counter-JE that reverses a prior posted JE.
Optional classifier. Used by reporting and by recurring/closing automation in later phases.
What this journal entry is for. Free-form business narrative.
Unique identifier for entity instances
Business identifier for this journal entry. Manually entered in Phase 5; auto-numbered as JE-{entitycode}-{NNNNNN} by PostJournalEntryPlugin in Phase 6.
User who posted this JE to the ledger. SoD policy: may equal approver per current approval-policies.md; configurable per policy row.
When this JE was posted to the immutable ledger. Set by PostJournalEntryPlugin.
Accounting date for this JE. May differ from the creation date. Drives the fiscal period lookup.
External reference (invoice number, bill number, check number, etc.).
Inverse pointer: if this JE was reversed, link to the reversal JE.
If this JE is a reversal of another, link to the original. Set by the reversal action.
Narrative source description (e.g., "AP Bill 12345 from ACME Corp"). Free-form.
Workflow state. Draft -> PendingApproval -> Approved -> Posted is the normal path. Voided = abandoned before posting. Reversed = a counter-JE has been posted that nets this one out.
Editable; not yet submitted for approval.
Submitted; awaiting approver action.
Approved by a user other than the creator (SoD).
Lines have been written to the immutable ledger. Cannot edit; corrections require a reversing JE.
A counter-JE has been posted that reverses this one.
Abandoned before posting.
Workflow state. Draft -> PendingApproval -> Approved -> Posted is the normal path. Voided = abandoned before posting. Reversed = a counter-JE has been posted that nets this one out.
Sum of all credit lines for this JE. Maintained by PostJournalEntryPlugin (Phase 6); zero until lines are added.
Sum of all debit lines for this JE. Maintained by PostJournalEntryPlugin (Phase 6); zero until lines are added. Must equal rm_totalcredit at Approval and Post.
Status of the Journal Entry
Status of the Journal Entry
Reason for the status of the Journal Entry
Reason for the status of the Journal Entry
For internal use only.
Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
